states.name: Antares
states.title: Fiery Island Flower
states.description: She's traveled from the great Mount Fornax to the sprawling ports of Zuthua. She's conquered the art of monster raising, learned fire magic, and even made a friend or two along the way. But now, Antares faces her most daunting challenge yet. Before the summer ends, she must learn to relax! Luna told her so the last time they met. Of course, she meant it as a joke, but never let it be said that Antares disappoints her idols. She stayed up all night researching the ideal vacation, and by the next morning, she was off to Laomis, a freshly sewn swimsuit in her bag.

states.name: Antares
states.title: Fiery Island Flower
states.description:
Sitting by the pool with flowers in her hair and a picnic basket at her side, Antares may seem like a natural at this 'vacation' thing. But don't be fooled. Relaxing is harder than it looks.

Laomis has lived up to its reputation as a paradise. Everywhere she looks, there's another view to appreciate, another meal to try, another kind local to meet...she can barely keep up with it all! How will she ever experience the whole island before the season ends?

Oh. That's right: summer will come again soon. Maybe, bit by bit, year by year, she can become a vacation master after all.
